creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I have kf5-ktexteditor-5.63.0 and kf5-kparts-5.63.0 installed.

However, this statement
> find_package(KF5TextEditor)

fails to find kf5-kparts for some reason:
> CMake Warning at CMakeLists.txt:1 (find_package):
>   Found package configuration file:
> 
>     /usr/local/lib/cmake/KF5TextEditor/KF5TextEditorConfig.cmake
> 
>   but it set KF5TextEditor_FOUND to FALSE so package "KF5TextEditor" is
>   considered to be NOT FOUND.  Reason given by package:
> 
>   KF5TextEditor could not be found because dependency KF5Parts could not be
>   found.
